name: Dreame Vacuum
author: Oikos
description: Card Dreame Vacuum con UI ispirata all'app ufficiale: mappa, sheet di pulizia (CleanGenius/Personalizza), base stazione, impostazioni MopExtend™.
description_en: Dreame Vacuum card with app-inspired UI: map, cleaning sheet (CleanGenius/Customize), base station, MopExtend™ settings.
description_de: Dreame Vacuum-Karte mit App-inspirierter Oberfläche: Karte, Reinigungsblatt (CleanGenius/Anpassen), Basisstation, MopExtend™-Einstellungen.
description_es: Tarjeta Dreame Vacuum con interfaz inspirada en la app oficial: mapa, hoja de limpieza (CleanGenius/Personalizar), estación base, ajustes MopExtend™.
description_fr: Carte Dreame Vacuum avec interface inspirée de l'app officielle : carte, fiche de nettoyage (CleanGenius/Personnaliser), station de base, paramètres MopExtend™.
